testcase.name: createReservation
testcase.system-out: Request method: POST Request URI: http://172.20.207.16/api/client-relations/tasks-full/booking-rented-car Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Authorization=Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzUxMiJ9.-0YAiLCJncm91cEFjY2Vzc2VzIjpbeyJpZCI6IjE0MGEwMjEwLWQxZDEtNDM5ZS1iM2E0LTBlZTViZTZkMjlkMiIsIm5hbWUiOiLQkNC00LzQuNC90LjRgdGC0YDQsNGC0L7RgCAtINC_0L7Qu9C90YvQuSDQtNC-.DoBw6NLVnPhf38WTV686SeI5AhP_LS7eqgmeO2srcSP1kXniPmfp-FxSNXt5FLPTu2zZ8HfZs8bSC8605rIUVg Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json; charset=UTF-8 Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "destination": "Автотест", "startDate": "2026-04-22 22:00:31.750", "endDate": "2026-04-22 23:00:31.750" }

getReservationVats
createReservationFord

Request method: POST Request URI: http://172.20.207.16/api/client-relations/tasks-full/booking-rented-car-ford Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Authorization=Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzUxMiJ9.-0YAiLCJncm91cEFjY2Vzc2VzIjpbeyJpZCI6IjE0MGEwMjEwLWQxZDEtNDM5ZS1iM2E0LTBlZTViZTZkMjlkMiIsIm5hbWUiOiLQkNC00LzQuNC90LjRgdGC0YDQsNGC0L7RgCAtINC_0L7Qu9C90YvQuSDQtNC-.DoBw6NLVnPhf38WTV686SeI5AhP_LS7eqgmeO2srcSP1kXniPmfp-FxSNXt5FLPTu2zZ8HfZs8bSC8605rIUVg Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json; charset=UTF-8 Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "destination": "Автотест", "startDate": "2026-04-22 22:00:38.621", "endDate": "2026-04-22 23:00:38.621", "objectUkId": "b71a6e71-da3a-46e7-a86f-0e0f0f8ccf67" } HTTP/1.1 400 Bad Request Server: nginx Date: Wed, 22 Apr 2026 18:49:40 GMT Content-Type: application/json Transfer-Encoding: chunked Connection: keep-alive X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff X-XSS-Protection: 0 Cache-Control: no-cache, no-store, max-age=0, must-revalidate Pragma: no-cache Expires: 0 X-Frame-Options: DENY Access-Control-Expose-Headers: Content-Disposition Cache-Control: private, must-revalidate, max-age=0
{ "type": "CommonException", "message": "Not available cars for booking at this time", "messages": null, "detail": null }
